data.body: 43c9 implementation complete in worktree: canonical shared/test-design.md + 3 byte-identical copies, drift test tests/unit/test_skill_shared_sync.py (identity + detection cases), rebar-debug Step 4 retitled 'Design and prove a RED oracle' + contract-card handoff + defect-seeded mutation, taxonomy Phase 2 quantified-eval qualification, rebar-implement 4a/4b integration, rebar-brainstorm before-recording-tickets integration, README convention. All AC greps/cmp pass; make lint+test running.
